base_expression.text: Alarm with immediate and controlled shutdown
base_expression.label: alarm event/state

synonyms: Alarm causing immediate and controlled shutdown
lexical_variants: Alarm that triggers immediate and controlled shutdown
Alarm causing immediate and controlled shutdown
Alarm with immediate and controlled shutdown
enriched_expressions.definition: An alarm event that initiates both an immediate shutdown and a controlled shutdown of a machine or system, typically used to prevent damage or ensure safety.

evidence.content: {"aliases": ["Shutdown alarm", "Emergency shutdown alarm"], "synonyms": ["Alarm-triggered shutdown", "Alarm causing immediate and controlled shutdown"], "lexical_variants": ["Alarm that triggers immediate and controlled shutdown", "Alarm causing immediate and controlled shutdown", "Alarm with immediate and controlled shutdown"], "definition": "An alarm event that initiates both an immediate shutdown and a controlled shutdown of a machine or system, typically used to prevent damage or ensure safety.", "ontology_hints": ["TRIGGERS immediate shutdown", "TRIGGERS controlled shutdown", "REQUIRES shutdown procedure", "HANDLED_BY operator", "REFERENCES manual section (e.g., §4.2.3)", "Situation S1 (shutdown situation)", "Situation S2 (controlled shutdown situation)"]}

enriched_expressions.definition: The act of initiating or enabling the authorization effect within a system, typically by a control action that causes the effect to become active.

evidence.content: {"aliases": ["authorization effect opening", "opening of the authorization effect"], "synonyms": ["activation of the authorization effect", "initiation of the authorization effect"], "lexical_variants": ["opening of the authorization effect", "opening authorization effect"], "definition": "The act of initiating or enabling the authorization effect within a system, typically by a control action that causes the effect to become active.", "ontology_hints": ["Event", "AuthorizationEffect", "ActivationEvent"]}
